name: Recompensa por completar tarea
description: Concede 5 puntos la primera vez que se completa la tarea (task.measurements_count == 1) y 2 puntos en completados sucesivos. Pensada para reforzar el hito inicial sin penalizar la repetición.
blocklyXml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="gd_rule" id="rule_first" x="40" y="40"><value name="WHEN"><block type="gd_compare" id="cmp_first"><field name="OP">==</field><value name="LEFT"><block type="gd_field" id="f_task_count"><field name="PATH">task.measurements_count</field></block></value><value name="RIGHT"><block type="gd_literal_number" id="lit_one_check"><field name="VALUE">1</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="THEN"><block type="gd_assign_points" id="assign_first"><value name="VALUE"><block type="gd_literal_number" id="lit_five"><field name="VALUE">5</field></block></value><field name="CASE_NAME">FirstCompletion</field></block></statement></block><block type="gd_assign_points" id="default_assign" x="40" y="260"><value name="VALUE"><block type="gd_literal_number" id="lit_two"><field name="VALUE">2</field></block></value><field name="CASE_NAME">TaskCompleted</field></block></xml>
